Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class AvaloniaHostCapabilityProvider

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora.Shell
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.dll

Avalonia-based implementation of IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider that binds tray and menu operations to Avalonia TrayIcon and NativeMenu controls. Non-tray/menu operations are delegated to an inner provider.

public sealed class AvaloniaHostCapabilityProvider : IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider, IDisposable
Inheritance
object
AvaloniaHostCapabilityProvider
Implements
IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider
IDisposable

Constructors

AvaloniaHostCapabilityProvider(IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider, ITrayIconResolver?)

Creates a new Avalonia host capability provider.

public AvaloniaHostCapabilityProvider(IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider inner, ITrayIconResolver? iconResolver = null)

Parameters

inner IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider

Inner provider for non-tray/menu operations (clipboard, file dialog, etc.).

iconResolver ITrayIconResolver

Optional tray icon resolver. Defaults to a composite resolver supporting avares:// and file paths.

Properties

NativeMenu

Gets the current Avalonia NativeMenu managed by this provider.

public NativeMenu? NativeMenu { get; }

Property Value

NativeMenu
